title: MobHat
description: Ever felt like your head was missing something? MobHat is a fun and lightweight plugin that lets you wear almost any creature in Minecraft as a hat!
body:
# What is MobHat?
Ever thought that standard helmets are a bit... boring? MobHat is a fun and simple plugin that allows players to wear almost any creature in Minecraft as a hat! But why stop at one? Create absurd and hilarious towers of mobs right on your own head, competing with friends to see who can build the tallest and silliest stack.

# Key Features
- **🤠 Wear (Almost) Any Mob:** With a simple Shift + Right-Click using an empty hand, wear a pig, a chicken, or even a Creeper! (Note: hostile mobs are disabled by default in the config!)
- **🗼 Build Hat Towers:** Don't stop at one! Stack mobs on top of each other, creating a living tower right on your head.
- **🔧 Configurable Stack Limit:** Set the maximum height of the hat tower in the config file to control the level of madness.
- **🎮 Simple & Intuitive Controls:** Easily take off the top hat by sneaking and looking up, or use the `/hat off` command. `/hat clear` removes the entire stack at once.
- **⚙️ Fully Configurable:** Enable or disable any mob for hat-wearing in a simple and clear `config.yml` file.

# Design Philosophy
This plugin was created with one goal in mind: to add pure, unadulterated fun to your server. There are no complex mechanics or dependencies—just a silly feature that is guaranteed to make your players laugh.

# ✅ Dependencies
This plugin has **no dependencies** and is ready to run right out of the box.
